description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a fenced yard with lush green lawns and several mature trees. The building features a flat roof and a clean, white facade with multiple rectangular windows and doors, providing a minimalist aesthetic. The property is enclosed by a combination of wooden and white masonry fencing, with a black metal gate at the front entrance. The landscaping includes a mix of manicured grass, shrubs, and strategically placed trees, offering both privacy and curb appeal. The bungalow appears to have a single story and a compact, rectangular footprint, with a driveway or walkway leading up to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a fenced yard, green lawns, and mature trees. The property features minimalist architecture and landscaped outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, black metal gate, and a clear view of the white facade with windows and trees flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the expanse of the backyard, additional trees, and the continuous fencing along the property.
description_view_2: Back corner view displaying the wooden fence, dense tree coverage, and the rear side of the bungalow with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backyard, wooden fencing, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the back property line.
